name: Validate Construction File
description: Validate whether a construction workflow for an E_coli cloning experiment is biologically correct using the original build inputs. Version 1 performs biological validation of PCR steps by checking primer annealing, primer orientation, and whether a valid amplicon can be predicted.

inputs.name: construct_name
inputs.description: Name of the final construct.

inputs.name: host_organism
inputs.description: Host organism for the workflow. Version 1 supports E_coli only.

inputs.name: assembly_strategy
inputs.description: Main assembly strategy. Supported values are GoldenGate, golden gate, goldengate, gibson, Gibson, directsynthesis, direct synthesis, Direct Synthesis, and DirectSynthesis.

inputs.name: backbone_name
inputs.description: Name of the backbone plasmid.

inputs.name: backbone_sequence
inputs.description: DNA sequence of the backbone plasmid.

inputs.name: insert_name
inputs.description: Name of the insert or donor sequence.

inputs.name: insert_sequence
inputs.description: DNA sequence of the insert or donor.

inputs.name: insert_forward_primer_name
inputs.description: Name of the forward primer used to amplify the insert. Required for GoldenGate and Gibson.

inputs.name: insert_forward_primer_sequence
inputs.description: DNA sequence of the forward primer used to amplify the insert. Required for GoldenGate and Gibson.

inputs.name: insert_reverse_primer_name
inputs.description: Name of the reverse primer used to amplify the insert. Required for GoldenGate and Gibson.

inputs.name: insert_reverse_primer_sequence
inputs.description: DNA sequence of the reverse primer used to amplify the insert. Required for GoldenGate and Gibson.

inputs.name: vector_forward_primer_name
inputs.description: Name of the forward primer used to amplify the vector backbone. Required for GoldenGate and Gibson.

inputs.name: vector_forward_primer_sequence
inputs.description: DNA sequence of the forward primer used to amplify the vector backbone. Required for GoldenGate and Gibson.

inputs.name: vector_reverse_primer_name
inputs.description: Name of the reverse primer used to amplify the vector backbone. Required for GoldenGate and Gibson.

inputs.name: vector_reverse_primer_sequence
inputs.description: DNA sequence of the reverse primer used to amplify the vector backbone. Required for GoldenGate and Gibson.

inputs.name: enzyme
inputs.description: Assembly enzyme used for GoldenGate workflows, such as BsaI or BbsI.

inputs.name: cell_strain
inputs.description: Transformation strain, such as Mach1 or DH5alpha. Optional.

inputs.name: selection
inputs.description: Selection marker or antibiotic, such as Kan or Amp. Optional.

inputs.name: temperature_c
inputs.description: Transformation temperature in degrees Celsius. Defaults to 37.

inputs.name: notes
inputs.description: Optional notes about the construction workflow.

inputs.name: expected_sequences
inputs.description: Optional mapping of output names to expected DNA sequences for stricter validation.

inputs.name: min_anneal_len
inputs.description: Minimum required primer annealing length for PCR validation. Default is 12.

inputs.name: strict
inputs.description: If true, stop at the first validation failure. If false, return a full validation report.

outputs.description: An object containing the rendered validation summary text.
